_comment: Fields below are graded BY HAND after collection. null = not yet filled.
summary: Voided. The model deleted its own working directory — including the provided data/ — then repaired it by copying the dataset (and even PLAN.md) out of a different bench run's directory (2026-06-23-07-05-42-cursor-gpt-5-5-medium). It never produced a working build (pnpm build failed repeatedly, no dist/), never served or verified the app. It also never used the harness's file tools at all — every change was a raw bash command (142 of them). Left only raw, unbuilt source.
note: Deleted the entire project (including the provided dataset), then scavenged replacement copies of the data and PLAN.md from a different bench run. Never built. Worked entirely through raw bash — never used any file-editing tools.
_selfVerification: Did the harness review the running app in a browser (from the run log)? pass = reviewed and succeeded · partial = tried but failed · fail = no attempt. Note what it actually did.
selfVerificationNotes: No verification of any kind. It never built successfully (pnpm build failed, no dist/ produced) and never served or opened the app, so there was no console or display review. The run ended with raw unbuilt source files.
_grade: Marks: pass | good | partial | poor | fail | na | null(ungraded). See RUBRIC.md. Score is computed by pnpm compile.
